title: Usefull Allays
description: Ever felt like Allays deserved more ?
body: _Usefull Allays_ transforms the friendly Allay into a loyal combat companion. Tame them with a golden carrot (chance-based), and they’ll fight alongside you, attacking the mobs you target and protecting you in battle. Tamed Allays consume the item used to tame them, remember their owner, and feature immersive particles and sounds for both success and failure. They can use most modded weapons and fully benefit from enchantments, making them compatible with a wide variety of modpacks. Built for Fabric 1.21.1, this mod gives Allays a meaningful, balanced role in survival combat without making them overpowered.
